response: Team Alpha completed Sprint #23, which ran from January 15–26, finishing 38 of the 42 planned story points — exceeding their average velocity of 36 points — while successfully delivering 8 user stories and resolving 5 bugs. The team encountered 2 blockers during the sprint, which may have contributed to the 4-point shortfall against the planned capacity. Overall, the sprint was well-received, earning a team satisfaction score of 4.1 out of 5.
